ValidationRule.description: Accident Management/New damage file cases cannot be Closed if Vehicle repaired is not checked
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT(CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName)),NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), OR(RecordTypeId = "012R0000000945e",RecordTypeId = "012R000000094BS"), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Category__c ,"Accident Management"), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Detail__c , "New damage file"), ISPICKVAL(Status , "Closed"), Vehicle_Repaired__c = FALSE)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Field: "Vehicle Repaired" must be checked in before closing your case
